{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323021820A31E6737A8D907DCE3B0"}"},"total":162},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7263023077301224232","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"有点玄幻，有点激励，有点冲动，有点咸鱼翻身的感觉，从学渣到学霸再到学神，最后到科幻，再到玄幻，最后到虚幻，最后来个神操作，梦幻记忆。大大的脑回路清奇，也奇葩，让我有点看不懂，看不明白。不过作品还是值得我给大大点个四星评价。愿大大继续努力，加油吧！","text_exts":[{"e":21,"s":17,"text":"咸鱼翻身","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%92%B8%E9%B1%BC%E7%BF%BB%E8%BA%AB&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177420350007DCE3B0%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227263023077301224232%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227057509131346775044%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%92%B8%E9%B1%BC%E7%BF%BB%E8%BA%AB%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1691054380,"group_id":"7057509131346775044","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"喜欢穿越，重生作品","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6MMGzH4pkrX8j5SYQWEsrI=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/b5ed3461a25148868c18c190a4dc5fc9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790303&x-signature=eAhqD54UL2y4i1zGstWUpcFqnqs%3D","user_id":"470234002360967","user_name":"快乐地阿宝"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"470234002360967","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1647680247,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn"
